novel_features.name: Workspace Change Diff
novel_features.description: Show everything in the workspace added, edited, or deleted since your last sync or a given timestamp.
novel_features.rationale: API is stateless; delta detection requires a prior snapshot, which only the local store provides.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use at the start of an agent session to orient on what has changed before taking action.

novel_features.name: Stale Page Detection
novel_features.description: List pages and records not edited in N days, filterable by database, parent, or tag.
novel_features.rationale: No API filter for 'last-edited before date' across multiple databases simultaneously.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to identify dead pages before workspace cleanup or to flag deliverables overdue for review.

novel_features_built.name: Workspace Change Diff
novel_features_built.description: Show everything in the workspace added, edited, or deleted since your last sync or a given timestamp.
novel_features_built.rationale: API is stateless; delta detection requires a prior snapshot, which only the local store provides.
novel_features_built.why_it_matters: Use at the start of an agent session to orient on what has changed before taking action.

novel_features_built.name: Stale Page Detection
novel_features_built.description: List pages and records not edited in N days, filterable by database, parent, or tag.
novel_features_built.rationale: No API filter for 'last-edited before date' across multiple databases simultaneously.
novel_features_built.why_it_matters: Use to identify dead pages before workspace cleanup or to flag deliverables overdue for review.

narrative.headline: Every Notion database queryable offline — cross-workspace SQL joins, stale detection, and relation graph traversal the UI can never give you.
narrative.value_prop: notion-pp-cli syncs your Notion workspace into a local SQLite store and exposes commands that answer compound questions the Notion UI cannot: cross-database joins, status drift, dead links, workspace health, and who owns what across every client. Works offline and ships a full MCP server so agents can load rich project context in a single call instead of 30.
narrative.auth_narrative: Requires a Notion Internal Integration token. Create one at notion.so/my-integrations, then share your databases with it. Set NOTION_TOKEN in your environment. Run `notion-pp-cli sync` once to populate the local store.

quickstart.comment: Mirror your entire workspace to local SQLite — takes 30-120 seconds depending on workspace size
Get a hygiene scorecard for the whole workspace

quickstart.command: notion-pp-cli sql "SELECT title, last_edited_time FROM pages ORDER BY last_edited_time DESC LIMIT 20" --agent
quickstart.comment: Raw SQL against the local store for custom queries

troubleshoots.symptom: sync returns 'object not found' for some databases
troubleshoots.fix: Share those databases with your integration at notion.so/my-integrations — the token only sees what you've explicitly shared
Run `notion-pp-cli sync --full` first to populate the local store
Token format is `ntn_...` for internal integrations — do not use your Notion account password or OAuth tokens

narrative.when_to_use: Use notion-pp-cli when you need compound queries across multiple linked Notion databases, workspace-wide status checks, or offline Notion access. Ideal for consultants managing multiple client workspaces, agents that need token-efficient project context, or anyone doing periodic workspace cleanup. Not a substitute for the Notion web UI for day-to-day editing.

recipes.title: Cross-database join: open tasks by client
recipes.command: notion-pp-cli sql "SELECT p.title, i.status, i.assignee FROM pages p JOIN data_source_items i ON i.page_id = p.id WHERE i.status != 'Done' ORDER BY p.title" --agent --select title,status,assignee
recipes.explanation: Joins pages and data source items to produce a flat list of all open work across every database — impossible in the Notion UI.

recipes.title: Morning triage: what changed overnight
recipes.explanation: Show everything edited in the last 8 hours — use at session start to orient before taking action.

recipes.title: Load agent project context
recipes.explanation: Returns a structured snapshot of a project in one call — replaces 10-30 sequential API calls in agent workflows.

recipes.title: Find stalled work items
recipes.explanation: Surface tasks nominally in progress but untouched for 2 weeks — the Notion UI has no equivalent filter.

recipes.title: Workspace cleanup: orphans and dead links
recipes.explanation: Two commands to find pages safe to delete and relations that are already broken — run before any workspace restructuring.
